description: Daisy and Sousa wake up as captives of Nathaniel Malick. Nathaniel taunts them and reveals his interest in Daisy's powers and Sousa's supposed slow aging. He references his dark family and Whitehall, showing his desire to experiment on Daisy to obtain her abilities. Sousa tries to protect Daisy, but Malick orders his men to begin the procedure on her.

transcript.line: Good to see you move.
My head. Ohh, I can barely... Feels like there's cement running through my veins.
Drugs. Haven't been this messed up since the field hospital.
I want to hea... hear that story when I... I can remember it. I can't quake. Malick's little psycho...
Psycho? That's unfair... and very well-timed. Wow. Right as I'm walking in. Hi. Nathaniel. Uh, the two of you took me hostage... changed my life.
Yeah. Uh, will you unchain us, and we can hug it out? And Hydra and S.H.I.E.L.D. can be together at last.
Hydra? I-I look like Hydra to you? Take a look at Ron's suit. Guy's here ‘cause he's got mouths to feed, not ‘cause he worships a space octopus. No. Religion's not really my thing.
I don't want to know what your thing is, kid.

But it's you, Daniel. You're my thing. Whoa. Come on. Danny. You know. I know. Daisy here can move things without touching them. And you? You either fought the Krauts in diapers or you're aging much slower than the other 60-somethings I know.
Yeah, he's not what you think. He's not...
You mean he's not an Inhuman? He'd better hope he is. See, uh, the family business... I dabbled, but, um, nothing really spoke to me. Until I met you. Saw what you could do. Whoa.
You haven't even seen the half of it. I really hope not. And a cool thing to say, by the way. Your whole vibe is just... great.
That's why you took us hostage, to find out...
“Hostage” would imply that I'm using you as collateral to get what I want when, in fact, everything I want is right here, flowing through your veins.
This isn't the super serum. This is genetics.

Yeah, but I'm rich. It, uh, cuts down some barriers. Plus, Hydra families keep in touch. I mean, Dr. Reinhardt has some very helpful tips. What's he always saying? “Discovery requires experimentation”.
Dr. Reinhardt? Didn't we catch him in the war?
Yes, and thank you for your service. My generation just does not say it enough.
You mean Daniel Whitehall. I will crush you...
Yes. Do it. Just one bone shaker, and it's over. Show me what makes you so special.
We start with her.
This base just shot down a plane full of good agents.
They blew up the country's most important defense system. Of course we fired on them.
You didn't fire. Someone took over the Lighthouse, as we warned.
Imagine I believe you, and we've been infiltrated. What am I looking for?
They're partially synthetic humanoids. They don't quite act like us, but to blend in, they do steal and wear our faces.
They take our faces?
He's telling the truth. They're called Chronicoms.
And your name is Chastity McBride.
Insight was my first post out of the Academy. Hell of a mess you made. Enjoy your time in prison.
Easy, Kojak. Try to hold ourselves to a professional demeanor.
Sorry, sir. Ford requested you down in the basement in person, sir. They've got something.
See? We're handling this.
Let us help.
Did you pay Fred Malick a visit?
Yes. He's Hydra.
Not anymore. He's dead, so... you just stay here.
There's something wrong with that Agent.
I know. You'd think someone named Stoner would be a little more fun...
No. The woman. I felt nothing. Like you. She's a Chronicom.
All the cloaking in the world won't help if we're smoking.
The fire's out, okay? It's out.
We have a more pressing issue.
What is that? What was that?! And... just guessing... how's it gonna kill us?
When the Drive jumps, it takes the Zephyr with it due to a network of cables that encompass the ship.
It carries the current from the drive to the shielding around the Zephyr.
Without the shielding intact, only parts of the ship would jump away, and what remains would be pulverized like a Xandarian snail in a liquifactor.
Why do you sound so calm about that?!
And we could jump at any moment, so we need to fix this immediately.
Okay, so what do we do now?
The power regulator... take a look at it. You start there, and Enoch and I will rewire the control panel.
Consider it done.
Are you okay?
Shouldn't I know how to fix this? Wha... Wh... Why can't I remember how to fix it?
Don't worry, Jemma Simmons. It will be all right. But we must act now.
